grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to use System and Marks at one consented location
grant_and_term.renewal: Successive 5-year terms with 180-day notice. Must sign then-current FA (may have materially different terms). Renewal fee $5,000 ($2,500 if fully compliant).
grant_and_term.month_to_month_extension: Available by written agreement if renewal not completed. 30-day termination notice.

fees_and_payments.royalty: $150 per Transaction Side, due 15th of following month

site_selection_and_construction.hard_deadline: 180 days to complete training and begin operations
site_selection_and_construction.relocation: Allowed with written consent (90-day notice, 20 business day response)

training_obligations.who_must_attend: Office Manager + at least one Principal Equity Owner
training_obligations.completion_deadline: 180 days after FA signing, before opening
training_obligations.failure_consequence: Grounds for termination; may retake or send replacement
training_obligations.cost: Free for OM/PEOs; up to $750/day for others; travel at franchisee expense
training_obligations.ongoing_training: May be required at reasonable notice; $500-$5,000 fee
training_obligations.conferences_required: At least one OM and one PEO must attend regional/system-wide meetings

termination_triggers.cure_period_curable: 30 days (up to 15 additional days if nature of breach requires)
immediate_termination_triggers: Failure to commence operations within 210 days
Failure to comply with law (10 days after notice)
Repeatedly fail to comply with requirements
Failure to pay fees within 5 days of written notice
Imminent danger to public health or safety
termination_triggers.cross_default_scope: May declare default of all agreements with franchisee

lost_royalty_recovery.less_than_1_year: Greater of $20,000, 300% of royalties paid, or amount obligated
lost_royalty_recovery.1_to_2_years: Greater of 200% of royalties paid or amount obligated
lost_royalty_recovery.2_to_3_years: Greater of 150% of royalties paid or amount obligated
lost_royalty_recovery.over_3_years: Aggregate royalty paid or obligated for 3 years before termination

conditions: Franchisee in compliance with all material obligations
transfer_restrictions.response_time: 60 days after receipt of all documentation
transfer_restrictions.family_transfers: Allowed with consent (not unreasonably withheld). No ROFR. Management provision required.

noncompete_scope.during_term: No use of Marks, System, techniques, or proprietary information in connection with any non-IVRE business (Section 11.1, 11.3)
noncompete_scope.post_term: Must refrain from any use, direct or indirect, of trade secrets or proprietary information, including operational, sales, promotional and marketing methods (Section 11.2)
noncompete_scope.applies_to: Franchisee, Principal Equity Owners, Office Manager, other managers, directors, officers, general partners, affiliates

guaranty.scope: Absolute and unconditional guarantee of all payments and performance of all covenants
guaranty.who_signs: Each Principal Equity Owner and their spouses (if applicable)
guaranty.can_proceed_directly: Franchisor may proceed directly against guarantors without first proceeding against franchisee
guaranty.guaranty_venue: Court of Common Pleas, Dauphin County, PA or M.D. Pa.

liquidated_damages.basis: Estimated time for replacement franchisee to achieve similar revenue + franchisor processing/training costs

dispute_resolution.step_1: Settlement Conference: In-person meeting at franchisor HQ, without counsel, within 5 business days
dispute_resolution.step_2: Mediation: Mutually acceptable mediator (10+ years franchise experience), mutually agreed PA location, 60-day completion target
dispute_resolution.venue: Philadelphia County, PA (or franchisor HQ county, or franchisee's county at franchisor election)
dispute_resolution.arbitrator_cannot: Declare marks generic/invalid or award punitive damages

indemnification.franchisee_indemnifies_franchisor: All Losses from franchisee's intentional tort, negligence, or agent/servant actions relating to outlet operations
indemnification.franchisor_indemnifies_franchisee: Losses from franchisor's intentional misfeasance, gross negligence, or material breach
indemnification.standard: Asymmetric — franchisee covers negligence; franchisor covers only intentional misfeasance/gross negligence

force_majeure.abandonment_exception: Not deemed abandoned if closure due to natural disasters or matters beyond control, with 5-day notice and 180-day restoration deadline
force_majeure.general_force_majeure: Not separately addressed as a standalone clause. Abandonment definition contains the primary carve-out.

distinctive_clauses.eft_failure_is_material_default: Failure to implement EFT system is material default (Section 4.4)
distinctive_clauses.equity_certificate_legend_required: Must print restrictive legend on equity certificates (Section 3.5)
distinctive_clauses.no_accord_or_satisfaction: Partial payment does not constitute accord (Section 4.7)
distinctive_clauses.cpi_adjustable_all_fees: All fixed dollar amounts may be CPI-adjusted at franchisor's discretion (Section 4.8)
distinctive_clauses.telephone_number_assignment: Must assign all phone numbers/listings to franchisor upon termination (Section 15.1(b)(v))
distinctive_clauses.franchisor_right_to_cure_defaults: Franchisor may cure franchisee defaults and charge costs (Section 13.7)
distinctive_clauses.anti_waiver_carveout: No statement/questionnaire/acknowledgment waives state franchise law claims or disclaims reliance on franchisor statements (Section 16.14(b))

adrsa_key_burdens.failure_consequence: Loss of Royalty Share rights; individual FAs continue
adrsa_key_burdens.no_transfer: Except to entity 100% owned by individual area developer

guarantee_key_facts.primary_obligation: Guarantors are primary sureties — franchisor need not proceed against franchisee first
guarantee_key_facts.amendment_protection_waived: FA may be amended without guarantor consent; guarantor remains bound
guarantee_key_facts.venue: Dauphin County, PA (Court of Common Pleas) or M.D. Pa.
